target: 查看前照灯，确认它们是否亮起。

target: 查看尾灯，确认它们是否亮起。

source: Next, insert the Master Key. This unlocks the train's controls.
target: 接下来，插入主钥匙。这将解锁列车的控制系统。

source: Next, put the Reverser to the Off position.
target: 接下来，将换向器置于关闭位置。

source: Next, shut down the diesel engines.
target: 接下来，关闭柴油发动机。
北方铁路 323 型

source: Now the cab is setup, we can now open the doors. Open the left passenger doors by using the door controls.
target: 现在驾驶室已经布置好了，我们可以打开车门了。使用车门控制按钮打开左侧乘客车门。

source: Now the engines are started, put the Reverser to Forward so we can get moving.
target: 现在引擎已经启动，把换向器拨到前进挡，这样我们就可以出发了。

source: Now, raise the pantograph. The pantograph is an arm on the roof of the train that raises up to connect to the overhead wires to deliver power to the train.
target: 现在，升起受电弓。受电弓是列车车顶上的一个臂状装置，它可以升起与架空电线连接，为列车供电。
打开车门

source: On level grades you can coast to maintain your speed, reducing energy consumption and stress on the motors. When coasting always remain vigilant of the gradient, as changes could cause the train to speed up or slow down.
target: 在平缓路段，您可以滑行以保持速度，从而降低能耗和电机负荷。滑行时，务必时刻注意坡度，因为坡度变化可能导致列车加速或减速。

source: On the mainline, the Class 805s are restricted to 110 mph, following the ‘MU’ speeds displayed on speedboards. On the West Coast Mainline, only tilting trains can operate at speeds up to 125 mph due to tight curves.
target: 在干线上，805型列车的最高时速限制为110英里/小时，以速度指示牌上显示的“MU”速度为准。在西海岸干线上，由于弯道较急，只有摆式列车才能以最高125英里/小时的速度运行。
打开驾驶室门

source: Operate a Saturday London Euston to Preston service as far as Milton Keynes, taking leisure travellers home after a day in the capital. Engineering work means you'll be on the slows most of the way.

source: Step into the cab of the Class 805 Evero and take command of cutting-edge express services on the southern stretch of the West Coast Main Line. From the bustling platforms of London Euston to key stops like Watford Junction and Milton Keynes Central, you’ll operate high-speed intercity runs with tight timetables, changing conditions, and varied service patterns. Whether running non-stop or making strategic stops, your precision and focus are essential as you deliver the future of rail travel today.
target: 坐进805型Evero列车的驾驶室，掌控西海岸干线南段的尖端特快列车服务。从熙熙攘攘的伦敦尤斯顿站到沃特福德枢纽站和米尔顿凯恩斯中央站等重要站点，您将驾驶高速城际列车，应对紧凑的时刻表、不断变化的路况和多样化的服务模式。无论是直达列车还是战略性停靠，您的精准和专注都至关重要，因为您正在为当今的铁路旅行带来未来。

source: Step up to premium express duties with non-stop services and minimal margins for error. Deliver top-tier performance with professional timing and smooth handling to wrap up your journey in style.
target: 晋升至高级特快列车值乘任务，挑战一站直达服务，容错空间极小。凭借专业的对时和流畅的操作展现顶尖水平，以优雅的姿态为你的旅程画上圆满句号。

source: The Class 805 features a combined Power Brake Controller (PBC) that has both power and brake ranges to allow the train to accelerate and brake. Move the PBC into the power range so the train can move.
target: 805型列车配备了动力制动控制器（主手柄），该控制器同时具备动力和制动功能，使列车能够加速和制动。将主手柄切换到动力模式，列车即可行驶。

source: The Class 805s are bi-mode multiple units capable of running on their onboard diesel engines and the 25kV overhead wires. Built in Kasado, Japan by Hitachi Rail - with final assembly taking place in Newton Aycliffe - the units entered service on 2 June 2024.
target: 805型列车是双模动车组，既可使用车载柴油发动机运行，也可使用25千伏架空电线供电。该型列车由日立铁路公司在日本笠户制造，并在纽顿艾克利夫进行最终组装，于2024年6月2日投入运营。

source: The Class 805s consist of thirteen 5-car sets, replacing the older Class 221 'Super Voyager' units from 2002. These can be seen on services from London to Birmingham, Chester and North Wales. The units are maintained at Oxley depot near Wolverhampton.
target: 805型列车由13列5节车厢的编组列车组成，取代了2002年制造的老旧221型“超级旅行者”列车。这些列车运行于伦敦至伯明翰、切斯特和北威尔士的线路上。列车在伍尔弗汉普顿附近的奥克斯利车辆段进行维护。

飞翔的苏格兰人号

source: The coupler hatch needs opening on the other unit. Leave this cab; sit in the driver's seat on the other train and open it's coupler hatch.
target: 另一节车厢的连接器舱门需要打开。离开这节驾驶室；坐到另一节车厢的驾驶室里，打开它的连接器舱门。

source: The guard has confirmed that it was activated by mistake. You're good to start moving again.
target: 列车员已确认该装置系误启动。您可以继续通行了。

source: The headlights let others know this train is operational. As we are in a yard, set the headlights to the Marker position.
target: 车头灯用于告知其他车辆这列火车正在运行。由于我们位于车辆段内，请将车头灯设置为标志灯位置。

source: The signaller has advised that the overheads have come down at Kings Langley. Stop at Watford Junction, before changing ends to head back to London Euston.
target: 信号员通知，金斯兰利站的架空电线已掉落。请在沃特福德枢纽站停车，然后换向返回伦敦尤斯顿站。

source: The two units are now coupled together. Shutdown this cab and move to the front of the train so we can start the passenger duties.
target: 两节车厢现在已经连接在一起。关闭驾驶室，移到列车前部，以便我们开始乘客服务。

source: The two units are now uncoupled. This concludes this training module on the Class 805.
target: 两台机组现已解挂。至此，805型列车的培训模块结束。

source: The units will need starting in diesel mode as there is an overhead isolation taking place.
target: 由于正在进行架空线隔离，这些机组需要以柴油模式启动。

source: The units will need starting in diesel mode as there is an overhead isolation taking place.
target: 由于正在进行架空线隔离，这些机组需要以柴油模式启动。

source: The weather is getting increasingly worse. Ensure you brake sufficiently early.
target: 天气越来越恶劣。务必提前制动。

source: There are reports of a failed unit at Camden. The signaller will route you onto the Up Slow at Wembley.
target: 据报道，卡姆登站一台设备发生故障。信号员会引导您在温布利站转到上行慢线。

source: This morning you're preparing this unit at Wembley Sidings and taking it to London Euston.
target: 今天早上，你在温布利支线准备这节车厢，然后把它运往伦敦尤斯顿。

source: This morning you're preparing this unit at Wembley Sidings and taking it to London Euston.
target: 今天早上，你在温布利支线准备这节车厢，然后把它运往伦敦尤斯顿。

source: To begin with, you’ll need to set the headlights in the rear cab to tail. Open the cab door, climb aboard and change the headlights.
target: 首先，你需要将后驾驶室的前照灯调到尾灯位置。打开驾驶室门，爬进去，然后调整前照灯。

source: To finish off with, we'll learn how to uncouple two Class 805 units.
target: 最后，我们将学习如何解挂两台 805 型机车。

source: To get used to the driving controls, perform one circuit of the loop. Depart when ready.
target: 为了熟悉驾驶操控，先绕环线跑一圈。准备好后即可出发。

source: To start the change over from diesel mode to electric mode, select Electric Mode.
target: 要开始从柴油模式切换到电动模式，请选择电动模式。

source: To start the train into diesel mode, press the Diesel button to put the train into diesel mode.
target: 要将列车切换到柴油模式，请按下柴油按钮将列车切换到柴油模式。

source: Today you'll be learning the basics of the new Class 805 bi-mode electric multiple units. You'll learn how to drive them; change power modes; couple and uncouple two units and perform passenger duties.
target: 今天，您将学习新型805型双模电力动车组的基本知识。您将学习如何驾驶它们；切换动力模式；连接和断开两节车厢；以及执行乘客服务任务。

source: Today you're driving 9G25 from London Euston to Birmingham New Street. The weather is suboptimal, and it's likely you will be caught up in disruption.
target: 今天你要驾驶9G25从伦敦尤斯顿站开往伯明翰新街站。天气不太理想，而且你很可能会遇到交通延误或取消的情况。

source: Today you're operating the first part of 9S44, a service running all the way to Edinburgh. Perform an exterior prep of the unit and then let passengers board.
target: 今天您负责运营9S44的第一段，该线路全程开往爱丁堡。请对车辆进行外部准备工作，然后允许乘客登车。

source: You'll be on the slow lines all the way into London Euston. Keep an eye out for adverse aspects.

source: You'll be sharing a platform with another train, so take the approach slowly.
target: 你将与另一列火车共用一个站台，所以要慢慢驶近。

source: You're currently in the office building where you'll need to walk to your train currently waiting for you in the Central Square outside. After preparing your train, you'll drive in diesel mode to the Switch Lines, then change over to electric mode to couple to another Class 805 at Station One.
target: 您目前身处办公楼内，需要步行前往停在楼外中央广场的列车。列车准备就绪后，您将以柴油模式行驶至调车线，然后在1号站切换至电力模式，与另一列805型机车连接。

source: You're now equipped with the core skills to operate the Class 805 Evero. With the basics mastered, you're ready to take on real express duties along the West Coast Main Line.
target: 您现在已掌握操作 805 型 Evero 列车的核心技能。掌握了基本操作后，您就可以在西海岸干线上承担真正的特快列车任务了。

source: You're only a few minutes late into Milton Keynes. Time to see how you've done.
target: 你只迟到了几分钟就到了米尔顿凯恩斯。是时候看看你做得怎么样了。

source: You're working 1P07 to Preston tonight. Because of engineering work, you'll be spending most of the time on the slows.
target: 你今晚要开1P07次列车去普雷斯顿。由于工程施工，你大部分时间都会在慢线上行驶。

source: You've completed your journey as a fully capable Evero driver. From first departure to final arrival, your consistency and control reflect the very best of express rail operation.
target: 您已圆满完成作为一名合格的Evero驾驶员的旅程。从首班车发车到末班车抵达，您始终如一的稳定表现和精准操控体现了高铁运营的最高水准。

source: You've successfully delivered fast-paced services out of London, showcasing your ability to handle busy terminal operations and quick acceleration into the mainline.
target: 您已成功提供从伦敦出发的快节奏服务，展现了您处理繁忙的终端运营和快速进入干线的能力。

source: Your ability to balance speed and stopping accuracy has been proven. You've demonstrated precision on services that demand both urgency and finesse.
target: 您已证明自己能够兼顾速度和制动精准度。您在需要兼顾紧迫性和技巧性的服务中展现了精准的操控能力。

source: You’ve mastered the Class 805 Evero across one of Britain’s busiest and most iconic main lines. From smooth departures to on-time arrivals, through all conditions and challenges, you've proven yourself a dependable driver of next-generation express services. The future of intercity travel is in capable hands — yours.
target: 您已熟练驾驶805型Evero列车，驰骋于英国最繁忙、最具标志性的主干线之一。从平稳发车到准点到达，无论遇到何种路况和挑战，您都已证明自己是新一代特快列车服务的可靠驾驶员。城际旅行的未来掌握在您手中。

source: You’ve shown composure and skill under pressure. No matter the challenge, you’ve kept services running smoothly and delivered passengers safely and on time.
target: 你在压力下展现出了沉着冷静和娴熟的技能。无论面临何种挑战，你都确保了服务的顺利运行，并安全准时地将乘客送达目的地。
